Video.title: NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah
NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Video.summary: Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn go up against Eva Welsher and Angela Simon in the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinals.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2

Video.summary: Catch all the action from the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal 1 at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships held in Naples, Florida. This semifinal match features top senior pros Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy facing Jennifer Dawson and Bonnie Williams in a high-stakes contest. Expert commentary highlights key strategies, player strengths, and match dynamics including powerful serves from Ava Welsher, tactical lobs, and intense court positioning. Follow how the players adjust to crowd pressure and timeouts in this best-of-three game format. Get ready for a thrilling showdown in one of pickleball’s premier senior pro events.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Video.summary: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Video.summary: The Arizona Pickleball League is created -- 5 teams in the league, 4 teams make the playoffs, 1 will not. Meet Kyle Koszuta of the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: S01E01 - The Start

Image.alt: S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start

Video.summary: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2

Video.summary: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.
Video.title: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Image.alt: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold

Video.summary: The NCPA Nationals reach a fever pitch in Saint Louis as the University of Arizona Wildcats and the CU Boulder Buffaloes go head-to-head in a high-stakes, best-of-seven showdown. This elite showcase features "smash mouth" pickleball, where powerhouses like Eileen Tran and Frida Madsen utilize aggressive "Skills" to dominate the kitchen line. The intensity explodes during the "Racing" pace of sudden-death points, forcing competitors into a tactical "Freestyle" battle of wills as they navigate a tight center court with no room for error. With the series tied and mixed doubles on the horizon, every serve carries the weight of a national title.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 - University of Arizona vs. Univeristy of Colorado - Boulder

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 - University of Arizona vs. Univeristy of Colorado - Boulder
NCPA 2026 - University of Arizona vs. Univeristy of Colorado - Boulder
NCPA 2026 - University of Arizona vs. Univeristy of Colorado - Boulder

Video.summary: The intensity reaches a boiling point in Saint Louis as the NCPA Nationals transition to a high-stakes, single-elimination "win or go home" format. The University of South Florida Bulls and the Kansas Jayhawks take center stage in a best-of-seven battle where every point feels like a "Racing" sprint toward the championship crown. Watch as Austin King and Tessa Wilson utilize elite "Skills" to navigate a narrow center court, fending off a late-game surge by the Jayhawks to secure a hard-fought 11-8 victory. With the bracket tightening and powerhouses like Penn State and Michigan looming, this "Freestyle" display of collegiate talent proves that in the world of elite pickleball, there is zero room for error.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 - University of South Florida vs. Kansas Jayhawks

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 - University of South Florida vs. Kansas Jayhawks
NCPA 2026 - University of South Florida vs. Kansas Jayhawks
NCPA 2026 - University of South Florida vs. Kansas Jayhawks

Video.summary: The intensity reaches a fever pitch in Saint Louis as the NCPA Nationals move into a high-stakes, single-elimination "win or go home" format. The University of Florida Gators face a monumental challenge on Center Court against a "powerhouse" Utah Tech team featuring international pro talent. Watch as players like Lauren Mercado and Andres Tardio utilize elite "Skills" to navigate high-speed exchanges and strategic "Racing" sprints to the kitchen line. With their tournament lives on the line, both programs deliver a "Freestyle" display of collegiate athleticism that proves why every point in the bracket matters.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 - University of Florida vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 - University of Florida vs. Utah Tech
NCPA 2026 - University of Florida vs. Utah Tech
NCPA 2026 - University of Florida vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: The atmosphere at the Arch Pickleball Center reaches a fever pitch as Utah Valley and LSU clash in a high-stakes, sudden-death battle for survival. This elite matchup showcases the "Racing" speed of Ethan Martin against the tactical "Skills" of Rachel Gauff in a contest where every point determines who advances in the bracket. With a $1,000 bounty on the line, both teams engage in a fierce "Freestyle" display of collegiate athleticism that proves why new powerhouses are emerging on the national stage.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 - Utah Valley University vs. Louisiana State University

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 - Utah Valley University vs. Louisiana State University
NCPA 2026 - Utah Valley University vs. Louisiana State University
NCPA 2026 - Utah Valley University vs. Louisiana State University

Video.summary: The pressure reaches a boiling point in Game 6 as Virginia Tech enters a must-win situation to keep their championship hopes alive against a dominant Ohio State squad. This episode showcases the high-speed "racing" volleys and technical "skills" of the Buckeyes as they ignite a massive scoring heater to take an early commanding lead. Not to be outdone, the Hokies demonstrate their "freestyle" resilience with powerful put-aways and a scrappy defensive effort to counter the Buckeye momentum. With special guest Michael McDonald providing expert analysis from the booth, every point becomes a tactical battle for collegiate pickleball supremacy.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 - Virginia Tech vs. Ohio State University

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 - Virginia Tech vs. Ohio State University
NCPA 2026 - Virginia Tech vs. Ohio State University
NCPA 2026 - Virginia Tech vs. Ohio State University

Video.summary: The atmosphere at the Arch Pickleball Center is electric as the Wisconsin Badgers face off against the UCSD Tritons on Championship Sunday. The match features a high-speed Racing intensity as both teams fight to stay alive in the single-elimination bracket. Fans will see the refined Skills of Kina Chang and the tactical precision of Lisa Ritchie as they trade "laser beam" drives and calculated dinks at the kitchen line. With Freestyle shot-making on full display—from around-the-post (ATP) winners to highlight-reel volleys—this quarterfinal clash proves that the best collegiate pickleball in the nation was truly saved for Sunday.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 - University of Wisconsin vs. University of California San Diego

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 - University of Wisconsin vs. University of California San Diego
NCPA 2026 - University of Wisconsin vs. University of California San Diego
NCPA 2026 - University of Wisconsin vs. University of California San Diego

Video.summary: The atmosphere at the Arch Pickleball Center in Saint Louis reaches a fever pitch as the Utah Tech Trailblazers face off against the FAU Owls in a high-stakes semifinal showdown. This match showcases a "racing" intensity as Liam Duffin looks to maintain Utah Tech's momentum following their grueling victory over Colorado. Fans are treated to the technical "skills" and "freestyle" shot-making of Alex LaMacchia, whose crafty drop shots and highlight-reel volleys keep the score neck and neck throughout the opening game. With a spot in the National Championship on the line, both squads must navigate high-pressure video challenges and tactical timeouts in a match many spectators believe is worthy of the final itself.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 Semifinal - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 Semifinal - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University
NCPA 2026 Semifinal - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University
NCPA 2026 Semifinal - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University

Video.summary: The NCPA Nationals reach a fever pitch as the UC San Diego Tritons and the FAU Owls clash on the legendary Championship Court. High-energy Racing defines the pace as the "spark plug" Lisa Ritchie leads the Tritons' relentless charge against an FAU squad hungry for a major $1,000 upset bounty. Fans will witness incredible Skills on display with precision dinks and "laser beam" shots, while the Freestyle creativity of players like Gianna Jarman produces impossible angles that defy gravity. With every point feeling like a collision, the intensity builds toward a heart-stopping Sudden Death finish where one team will finally punch their ticket to the national title game.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 Semifinal - University of California San Diego vs. Florida Atlantic University

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 Semifinal - University of California San Diego vs. Florida Atlantic University
NCPA 2026 Semifinal - University of California San Diego vs. Florida Atlantic University
NCPA 2026 Semifinal - University of California San Diego vs. Florida Atlantic University

Video.summary: The Arch Pickleball Center in Saint Louis sets the stage for a high-stakes National Championship showdown between the FAU Owls and the UCSD Tritons. Fresh off a dominant semifinal run, FAU brings an imposing lineup of heavy hitters who push the pace with "racing" intensity and technical "skills" that have kept opponents off-balance all weekend. UCSD enters the finals as a battle-tested squad, having survived a grueling seven-game sudden-death thriller to earn their spot on center court. This match highlights the "freestyle" adaptability of these elite student-athletes as they battle through mental fatigue and physical exhaustion for the ultimate collegiate title.
Video.title: NCPA 2026 Final - Florida Atlantic University vs. University of California San Diego

Image.alt: NCPA 2026 Final - Florida Atlantic University vs. University of California San Diego
NCPA 2026 Final - Florida Atlantic University vs. University of California San Diego
NCPA 2026 Final - Florida Atlantic University vs. University of California San Diego
